{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Imperial Palace (Cradle)
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Imperial]] Palace is a place where [[Eithan]] trespasses.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c5">''Skysworn'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
